headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 15, 2026**
article:
The Baltimore Orioles secured a convincing 7-0 victory over the New York Yankees, with Kyle Bradish leading the way on the mound. Bradish pitched 6.0 innings, striking out 7 batters and allowing just 1 hit. In other action, the Cleveland Guardians took down the Los Angeles Angels 4-2, with Parker Messick earning the win after 6.2 innings of work.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Cal Raleigh of the Seattle Mariners, who was placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right oblique strain. The Colorado Rockies also lost Jimmy Herget to a 15-day injured list retroactive to May 13, 2026, due to a right shoulder impingement. Other teams have also suffered injuries, including the Athletics, Miami Marlins, New York Mets, Cincinnati Reds, Los Angeles Angels, and Baltimore Orioles.

The MLB trade market was active, with several teams making moves. The Athletics acquired LHP José Suarez from the Seattle Mariners in exchange for cash. The Arizona Diamondbacks traded for OF Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for CF Alek Thomas. The San Francisco Giants traded C Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for LHP Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Baltimore Orioles also acquired RHP Enyel Garcia and RHP Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash.

top_news.title: **Yankees Fall to Orioles in Dominant 7-0 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a convincing 7-0 victory over the New York Yankees, with Kyle Bradish leading the way on the mound. Bradish pitched 6.0 innings, striking out 7 batters and allowing just 1 hit.

top_news.title: **Guardians Take Down Angels 4-2**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured a 2-4 win over the Los Angeles Angels, with Parker Messick earning the win after 6.2 innings of work. Zach Neto led the Angels' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Edge Reds in Thrilling 8-7 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a hard-fought 8-7 win over the Cincinnati Reds, overcoming a late deficit to claim the game. Tyler Stephenson led the Reds' offense with a home run and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rockies Rout Pirates 10-4**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies dominated the Pittsburgh Pirates, securing a 10-4 victory. Mickey Moniak led the Rockies' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run performance, driving in 5 runs.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Pirates in 7-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies suffered a 7-2 defeat at the hands of the Pittsburgh Pirates, marking a tough outing for the team. Impact hitters for the Pirates included Ryan O'Hearn, Konnor Griffin, Endy Rodríguez, and Jared Triolo.

top_news.title: **Nationals Suffer Historic Loss to Reds**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals fell to a 15-1 defeat at the hands of the Cincinnati Reds, marking a lopsided victory for the home team. Impact players for the Reds included Elly De La Cruz, Spencer Steer, and Matt McLain, while Foster Griffin and Chase Burns stood out on the mound.

top_news.title: **Raleigh Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Seattle Mariners catcher Cal Raleigh has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right oblique strain.

top_news.title: **Athletics Acquire LHP José Suarez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Oakland Athletics have bolstered their pitching staff with the addition of left-handed pitcher José Suarez, acquired in a trade with the Seattle Mariners. The deal was made for cash considerations.
